summary: Soundboard capture of an unforgettable Chinese New Year show with a dragon‑dance during Space and strong performances of He's Gone, Smokestack Lightnin', Comes A Time and The Other One.
review: Fans rave about the unique dragon parade that wove through the crowd during Space and cite several standout moments – a soaring He's Gone → Smokestack Lightnin' → Comes A Time sequence and one of the coolest Other Ones ever heard.  The recording is a soundboard source, generally solid though some note patchy audio, while the drums are described as monster‑psychedelic and Jerry’s rendition of The Mighty Quinn shines despite his reportedly “sick” voice.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews highlight exceptional musical moments and a unique visual experience, outweighing only minor mentions of patchy audio; overall rating reflects strong show quality with decent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit soundboard comments; reviewers note the recording is generally solid but describe it as 'patchy' in places.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show built momentum from an intense first set into a legendary Space where a fire‑breathing Chinese dragon stole the spotlight, leading into a psychedelic second set highlighted by a monster drum groove and a standout Other One.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia sounded 'sick' (both metaphorically and literally) but delivered an iconic performance of The Mighty Quinn.
band_member_comments.Drums: Monstrous, psychedelic drumming was a high point; Chinese drummers added extra visual flair.
